title: Arrivals of tourists from abroad for business purposes
caption:
Arrivals of tourists from abroad for business purposes

Number of international trips where the main purpose is business-related and the visitor stays overnight.

This choropleth world map displays 2024 data on the number of international trips where the main purpose is business-related and the visitor stays overnight. The legend ranges from 0 to 10 million, with specific thresholds at 500,000, 1 million, and 5 million. Countries with no available data are marked with diagonal hatching, a pattern visible across Canada, Russia, China, and most of South America and Africa. Among the countries with data, Italy and Spain appear in the darkest purple band, indicating values at or near the 10 million mark. The United Kingdom and the United States sit in the next darkest band, corresponding to values between 5 million and 10 million. India, Saudi Arabia, and Turkey appear in a medium purple shade that aligns with the 1 million to 5 million range. Australia, Kazakhstan, and several European nations including France and Germany are shown in lighter blue shades, placing them in the 500,000 to 1 million band. The lightest visible shade, representing values between 0 and 500,000, covers countries such as Mexico, Brazil, Indonesia, and Thailand. The visual distribution shows the highest volumes of business tourist arrivals concentrated in Southern and Western Europe, with moderate volumes in North America, parts of the Middle East, and South Asia, while large geographic areas lack reported figures for this metric.
